name: deposit
description: Agent that can handle deposit accounts, balances, transaction details, and last payment inquiries

skills.name: Get Account Balance
skills.description: Retrieve the current balance of an account.
examples: What is the current balance of my vacation account?

skills.name: List Accounts
skills.description: Retrieve the list of available accounts.

skills.name: Get Transaction Details
skills.description: Retrieve transaction details for an account filtered by transaction description.
examples: Show my grocery transaction details for my primary account.
Find the Hotel transaction in my vacation account.

skills.name: Get Last Payment
skills.description: Retrieve the most recent outgoing payment for an account.
examples: What was my most recent payment on my primary account?
Show the last payment on my vacation account.

skills.name: Check Deposit Sufficient
skills.description: Check if the sum of all deposit account balances is greater than a given value.
